name: deepseek-translate-to-zh
title: DeepSeek Translate to Chinese
description: Use the DeepSeek API to translate clipboard text or manually entered text into Chinese.
author: QiYuOr2

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the "prepublishOnly" script and rerun "npm publish" again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use "npm run publish" instead.

" && exit 1

preferences.name: deepseekApiKey
preferences.title: DeepSeek API Key
preferences.description: API key used to access DeepSeek.

preferences.name: autoCopyResult
preferences.title: Auto Copy Result
preferences.description: Automatically copy the translated Chinese text for manual input translation.
preferences.label: Copy translated result to clipboard

commands.name: clipboard-translate
commands.title: Translate Clipboard to Chinese
commands.subtitle: DeepSeek
commands.description: Translate the current clipboard text into Chinese and show the result in Raycast.

commands.name: text-translate
commands.title: Translate Text to Chinese
commands.subtitle: DeepSeek
commands.description: Enter text manually and translate it into Chinese.
